title: TFFunction variables should be singletons when created inside of a TFFunction
description: Avoid creating multiple instances of variables inside TFFunction, which can lead to inconsistent and unpredictable behavior.
message: Multiple instances of variable declared inside TFFunction.
recommendation: Use a global variable or move the variable outside of the TFFunction

noncompliant.description: Multiple instances of variables declared inside TFFunction

compliant.description: Reusing a global variable inside the TFFunction

why_is_this_an_issue: Multiple instances of variables inside TFFunction can lead to inconsistent and unpredictable behavior.
how_to_fix: Use a global variable or move the variable outside of the TFFunction

metadata.title: TFFunction variables should be singletons when created inside of a TFFunction
